findings.note: The provider helper remains a bounded command-scoped HTTP wrapper and does not start a local server or implement routing/fallback execution.
Validate/check packets keep verification_scope route_provider_only and preserve listener_proven=false, runtime_claim_blocked=true, profile_ready=false.
external-models status remains synthetic lifecycle truth and does not absorb provider validation truth.
runtime.py is dirty in the working tree but not required by the C3 implementation and must stay out of staging.
External-models test modules have non-zero guards and current runs executed 8 and 16 tests respectively.
